A contract address hosts a smart contract, which is a set of code stored on the blockchain that runs when predetermined conditions are met. Learn more about addresses in our Knowledge Base.

Address QR Code
My Address - Private Name Tag or Note

My Name Tag:

Private Name Tags (up to 35 characters) can be used for easy identification of addresses

Private Note:

A private note (up to 500 characters) can be attached to this address.
Please DO NOT store any passwords or private keys here.
View all Private Name Tags
Compiler specific version warnings:
The compiled contract might be susceptible to the Solidity Compiler Bugs below:
  1. LostStorageArrayWriteOnSlotOverflow (low-severity)
  2. AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup (medium-severity)
  3. DirtyBytesArrayToStorage (low-severity)
  4. NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation (very low-severity)
  5. ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory (very low-severity)
  6. KeccakCaching (medium-severity)
  7. EmptyByteArrayCopy (medium-severity)
  8. DynamicArrayCleanup (medium-severity)
  9. MissingEscapingInFormatting (very low-severity)
  10. ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck (very low-severity)
  11. TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents (very low-severity)
  12. MemoryArrayCreationOverflow (low-severity)
